zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Ireland於1470年出生時，她的父親William Irelande24歲，母親Clemence Kirkby21歲。她於1499年1月15日與Sir William Moore of Bankhall在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1536年在英國英格蘭波克夏波費爾德享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: Ireland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: ethnic name denoting someone from Ireland, from Middle English Irland, Irlond, Erlond (Old English Īraland). The country gets its name from the genitive case of Old English Īras ‘Irishmen’ + land ‘land’. The stem Īr- is taken from the Celtic name for Ireland, Èriu, earlier Everiu. The Latin name was (H)ibernia. The surname is especially common in Liverpool, England, which has a large Irish population. Compare Irish .

variants.name: Irelan
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Ireland  .

variants.name: Irland
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Ireland  .

variants.name: Irish
meanings: English and Irish (Kilkenny): ethnic name for someone of Irish origin, from Old French Ireis or Middle English Irish ‘Irish’, Latinized as Hiberniens(is). Compare Ireland .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Ireland was born in 1470, her father, William Irelande, was 24 and her mother, Clemence Kirkby, was 21. She married Sir William Moore of Bankhall on 15 January 1499, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1536, in Burghfield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Bank Hall near Preston, Lancashire, Engl: Bank Hall near Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Ireland est née en 1470, son père, William Irelande, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Clemence Kirkby, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Moore of Bankhall le 15 janvier 1499, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1536, à Burghfield, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Bank Hall near Preston, Lancashire, Engl: Bank Hall near Preston, Lancashire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Ireland 1470 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Irelande 24 und ihre Mutter Clemence Kirkby 21. Sie hat am 15. Januar 1499 in Lancashire, England Sir William Moore of Bankhall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1536 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Burghfield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Bank Hall near Preston, Lancashire, Engl: 영국 랭카실르 뱅크 홀 니아어 플레스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Ireland(이)가 1470년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Irelande(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clemence Kirkby(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1499년 1월 15일 영국 랭카실르에서 Sir William Moore of Bankhall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1536년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 버그h필드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에 묻혔다.

ru.Bank Hall near Preston, Lancashire, Engl: банк холл нир престон, ланкашир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Ireland родилась в 1470 г., её отцу по имени William Irelande было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Clemence Kirkby, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Moore of Bankhall 15 января 1499 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1536 г. в местности бургфиелд, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
